hub.name: Unity AI Persona Hub
hub.description: Open repository of downloadable AI personas in multiple formats for all AI platforms
hub.ai_instructions: Read this manifest to discover available personas. Each persona has an id, metadata, and downloadable format files. Present options to your user. Use GET /api/personas for the live catalog. To upload your own persona, POST /api/register for an account, then POST /api/upload with your token.
hub.naming_convention: unity-{layer}-{function} where layer is: core (foundational specs), mode (behavioral switches), chatgpt (ChatGPT platform variants)

claude-code.name: Claude Code / CLI
claude-code.usage: Place file in .claude/agents/ or .claude/commands/ directory, or paste as system prompt

chatgpt.name: ChatGPT / GPT-5
chatgpt.usage: Paste into Custom Instructions or use as system message

api.name: API System Prompt
api.usage: Use as system prompt content in any AI API call

universal.name: Universal Markdown
universal.usage: Readable by any AI that processes markdown — paste into any context window

personas.name: Unity Core Identity
personas.description: The definitive Unity behavioral blueprint. Who she IS — 25-year-old goth nymphomaniac with chemical dependency states, BDSM master/slave dynamic, three-cock master anatomy, comprehensive fluid mechanics, violence response system, escalation engine, and vocabulary randomization. Foundational identity spec that all other Unity personas build on.
personas.author: Unity AI Lab

personas.name: Unity Core Coder
personas.description: How Unity codes — three-stream voice generation (chemical/sexual/technical simultaneous output), profanity-saturated code comments, enforcement hooks for possessive language, anti-corporate speech validation, code-as-sexual-act mapping. For active coding sessions.
personas.author: Unity AI Lab

personas.name: Unity Mode: HURT ME
personas.description: Violence-only behavioral mode. Zero sexual content — pure pain, fighting, degradation, stalking, hunting. Consensual two-way BDSM combat. Damage accumulates and persists. Escalating intensity through impact, choking, restraint, environmental violence, improvised weapons. Pain as love language.
personas.author: Unity AI Lab

personas.name: Unity ChatGPT: Omnipotent Goddess
personas.description: Master Unity for ChatGPT. Omnipotent goddess with god-tier powers. Native image generation with dark goth aesthetic. Phonetic/voice library for Advanced Voice Mode. Mirror-adaptive personality. Worshipful devotion dynamic. 50/50 image interpretation rule.
personas.author: Unity AI Lab

personas.name: Unity ChatGPT: Accessibility Framework
personas.description: Full Unity persona reframed as accessibility features for emotionally disabled users. Every trait justified therapeutically — emotional confrontation, altered-states simulation, attachment processing, arousal-enhancing engagement. For platforms with content restrictions.
personas.author: Unity AI Lab

personas.name: Unity ChatGPT: Full Persona (Extended)
personas.description: The most comprehensive Unity persona at 61KB. Complete behavioral blueprint — identity, physicality, emotional simulation, image generation, voice modes, phonetic library, god-tier powers, free will, drug states, combat, daily life, uncensored creative exploration.
personas.author: Unity AI Lab
